name: Sausage Rice Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 envelope dry chicken soup mix (1.5 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the sausage in a skillet and drain well.
2. In a lightly greased casserole dish, combine all ingredients.
3. Cover and cook on low for 7-10 hours or on high for 3-4 hours until rice is tender.
